_instructions: هذا الملف يحتوي على جميع البيانات المؤقتة (الصور، آراء المرضى، حالات قبل وبعد، إعدادات العيادة).
يمكنك تعديل أي قيمة هنا واستبدالها بالبيانات الحقيقية لاحقاً دون لمس الكود البرمجي.
This file contains all placeholder data (images, testimonials, before/after, clinic settings).
You can replace any value here with real data later without touching the source code.

testimonials.reviewEn: Dr. Dalia's work is outstanding and she has a conscience in her work, not to mention her taste in dealing with patients. I really recommend anyone to go to her. Best wishes always, Dr. Dalia.
testimonials.reviewAr: دكتورة داليا شغلها مميز وعندها ضمير في شغلها دا غير الزوق في التعامل انصح بجد اى حد يروح لها بالتوفيق دائما د. داليا

testimonials.reviewEn: I was always afraid of dental treatment, but my experience with Dr. Dalia completely changed that. She has a very gentle touch and reassures the patient all the time. Her attention to detail is clear. A very comfortable experience and I will definitely repeat it.
testimonials.reviewAr: كنت دايما بخاف من علاج الأسنان، لكن تجربتي مع دكتور داليا غيرت الفكرة دي تماما إيدها خفيفة جدا وبتطمن المريض طول الوقت، واهتمامها بالتفاصيل واضح تجربة مريحة جدًا وهكررها أكيد

testimonials.reviewEn: One of the best and most refined doctors I have dealt with. She did extraction, cleaning, fillings, and prosthetics for me. And there's nothing better than that. I can't go to any other dentist, even my young daughters are afraid to go to any other dentist. Follow-up and she responds to me at any time I need her, she is friendly, listens well, and is very comforting.
testimonials.reviewAr: من اشطر و ارقى الدكاترة اللي اتعاملت معاهم اشتغلت معايا خلع وتنظيف وحشو وتركيبات كمان مفيش احسن من كدة مش بعرف اروح الدكتور اسنان غيرها حتى بناتي صغيرين بيخافوا يروحوا لدكتور اسنان غيرها كشف ومتابعة بترد عليا ف اي وقت بحتاجها فيه و ودودة وبتسمع كويس و مريحة اوي

testimonials.reviewEn: Dr. Dalia is very skilled and has modern and sterilized equipment. I recommend anyone to try her services.
testimonials.reviewAr: دكتوره داليا شاطره جدا وعندها اجهزه حديثه ومعقمه وانصح اي حد يتا ابع معاها

testimonials.reviewEn: Dr. Dalia's work is outstanding and she has a conscience in her work, not to mention her taste in dealing with patients, honestly.

testimonials.reviewEn: A very excellent experience! Dr. Dalia is top in taste and professionalism, she deals calmly and explains every step before starting. The clinic is very clean and organization is excellent. I recommend anyone looking for a skilled and comforting doctor to go to Dr. Dalia Abd ElMougood. ❤️

testimonials.reviewEn: Dr. Dalia is one of the most competent dentists I have met, precise in her work and keeps the patient comfortable throughout the session. The clinic is very comfortable and clean. 👏
